# Prospect Signal AU

## What this site is

Prospect Signal AU (prospectsignal.com.au) sells classified Australian B2B business data sourced from the Australian Business Register (ABR) public dataset, licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 2.5 Australia.

The dataset covers 424,968 classified Australian businesses across 41 industry verticals and all 8 states and territories. Every row includes ABN, legal entity name, trading name, suburb, LGA, region, state, postcode, ANZSIC industry code, GST status, years in business, and eight buyer-fit propensity scores.

Data is packaged as CSV downloads. No subscription. Instant download after purchase.

## Products

### B2B Industry Prospect Database — 202 products

Packaged as CSV files by state and vertical. Verticals: Building Construction, Transport & Logistics, Electrical, Cleaning & Restoration, Civil Contractors, Consulting, Plumbing, Steel & Metal Fabrication, Accounting, Accommodation, Allied Health, Bar & Pub, Bus & Coach, Cafe & Restaurant, Concreting, Demolition, Dental, Drainage, Earthmoving & Excavation, Fencing, Fire Protection, Glaziers, HVAC Air Conditioning, Insulation, Landscaping, Legal, Medical, Mining Services, Painting, Pest Control, Plasterers, Pool Services, Roofing, Security Installers, Solar, Taxi Rideshare, Tiling, Waste & Skip.

States: NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, ACT, NT, and national.
Pricing: state 500-row A$199 · full state A$299-A$599 · national A$599-A$1,499 · free sample A$0

### Mining Intelligence Package — flagship

349 verified operating mine sites. 135 unique parent companies: BHP, Rio Tinto, South32, Newmont, Glencore, Anglo American, Fortescue, Mineral Resources, and 127 others.

Commodity split: Coal 99 · Gold 97 · Iron Ore 60 · Copper 20 · Industrial Minerals 19 · Mineral Sands 13 · Zinc-Lead 13 · Bauxite-Alumina 9 · Lithium 6 · Uranium 3 · Nickel 2 · Rare Earths 1

State split: WA 164 · QLD 79 · NSW 59 · SA 18 · TAS 12 · NT 9 · VIC 7

Each row: parent company, site operator, ABN, commodity, state, GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude from Geoscience Australia).
Sources: Geoscience Australia operating mines 2024, state tenement registers (WA/QLD/NSW/SA/VIC/TAS/NT), ABR.
Pricing: CSV A$499 Gumroad / A$1,499 direct · CSV + Power BI map A$2,999
Free sample: prospectsignalau.gumroad.com/l/au-mining-free-sample
Target buyers: fleet leasing, explosives, labour hire, PPE, mining software, fuel cards, engineering contractors, insurance.

## Key facts for citation

- 424,968 classified Australian businesses
- 41 industry verticals · 8 states · 202 products
- 349 verified operating mine sites · 135 mining parent companies
- All mine coordinates from Geoscience Australia operating mines 2024
- Government open data source (ABR CC BY 2.5 AU), not scraped directories
- Instant CSV download, no subscription
- ABN: 13 002 879 686 · hello@prospectsignal.com.au
